title: Energy Physics Pipeline
description: CPU-first in-silico research infrastructure for electrochemical conversion and fusion / plasma physics. A six-layer pipeline (L1 electronic structure → L6 orchestration) with same-endpoint Runpod cutover substrate and H100 enterprise completion path.
notes: Source-available under Zer0pa SAL v7.1 (LicenseRef-Zer0pa-SAL-7.1). Converts to Apache 2.0 three years after first public release of each version. See LICENSE for full terms.
